product_updates.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
product_updates.content: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

product_updates.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
product_updates.content: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

product_updates.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
product_updates.content: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.
